message:
Implement queue timeout with graceful fallback to local build

Queue timeout handling (api.rs):
- Add queue_timeout check at start of polling loop
- Remove build from queue and update estimates on timeout
- Emit build_queue_removed event with reason "timeout"
- Return SelectionError("queue_timeout") to trigger local fallback
- Log warning with elapsed time and project ID
- Use ctx.queue_timeout_secs from DaemonContext

Test updates (api.rs, main.rs):
- Add queue_timeout_secs field to test DaemonContext fixtures
- Default to 300 seconds in tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
